state.description: Use this property to reveal the Success and Error states on the canvas so they can be styled. The Initial state is displayed when the page first opens. The Success and Error states are displayed depending on whether the Form submits successfully or unsuccessfully.

action.description: The URI of a program that processes the information submitted via the form.

template.name: Form
template.title: Form
template.description: Collect user data and send it to any webhook.

template.name: HeadSlot
template.title: Head slot
template.description: The Head Slot component lets you customize page-specific head elements (like canonical URLs), which merge with your site's global head settings, with Head Slot definitions taking priority over Page Settings. For site-wide head changes, use project settings instead.

clientOnly.description: Activate it for any scripts that can mutate the DOM or introduce interactivity. This only affects the published site.

executeScriptOnCanvas.label: Run scripts on canvas
executeScriptOnCanvas.description: Dangerously allow script execution on canvas without switching to preview mode. This only affects build mode, but may result in unwanted side effects inside builder!

items.name: image
items.title: Image
items.description: Add an image asset to the page. Webstudio automatically converts images to WebP or AVIF format and makes them responsive for best performance.

meta.description: Add an image asset to the page. Webstudio automatically converts images to WebP or AVIF format and makes them responsive for best performance.

optimize.description: Optimize the image for enhanced performance.

download.description: Whether to download the resource instead of navigating to it, and its filename if so

ordered.description: Shows numbers instead of bullets when toggled. See the “List Style Type” property under the “List Item” section in the Style panel for more options.

download.description: Whether to download the resource instead of navigating to it, and its filename if so

items.name: slot
items.title: Slot
items.description: Slot is a container for content that you want to reference across the project. Changes made to a Slot's children will be reflected in all other instances of that Slot.

meta.description: Slot is a container for content that you want to reference across the project. Changes made to a Slot's children will be reflected in all other instances of that Slot.

items.name: time
items.title: Time
items.description: Converts machine-readable date and time to a human-readable format.

meta.description: Converts machine-readable date and time to a human-readable format.

format.description:
Custom format template. Overrides Date Style and Time Style.

Tokens: YYYY/YY (year), MMMM/MMM/MM/M (month), DDDD/DDD/DD/D (day), HH/H (hours), mm/m (minutes), ss/s (seconds)

Examples:
- "YYYY-MM-DD" → 2025-11-03
- "DDDD, MMMM D" → Monday, November 3
- "DDD, D. MMM YYYY" → Mon, 3. Nov 2025

Day and month names use the selected language.

timeZone.description: Timezone used to display the date. Use "visitor" to display each visitor’s browser timezone after the page loads, or select/type an IANA timezone like "Europe/Berlin".

autopause.description: Whether to pause the current video when another Vimeo video on the same page starts to play. Set this value to false to permit simultaneous playback of all the videos on the page. This option has no effect if you've disabled cookies in your browser, either through browser settings or with an extension or plugin.

autopip.description: Whether to enable the browser to enter picture-in-picture mode automatically when switching tabs or windows, where supported.

autoplay.description:
Whether to start playback of the video automatically. This feature might not work on all devices.
Some browsers require the `muted` parameter to be set to `true` for autoplay to work.

backgroundMode.description: Whether the player is in background mode, which hides the playback controls, enables autoplay, and loops the video.

controlsColor.description: A color value of the playback controls, which is normally #00ADEF. The embed settings of the video might override this value.

doNotTrack.description: Whether to prevent the player from tracking session data, including cookies. Keep in mind that setting this argument to true also blocks video stats.

interactiveParams.description: Key-value pairs representing dynamic parameters that are utilized on interactive videos with live elements, such as title=my-video,subtitle=interactive.

keyboard.description: Whether to enable keyboard input to trigger player events. This setting doesn't affect tab control.

loading.description: Not a Vimeo attribute: Loading attribute for the iframe allows to eager or lazy load the source

loop.description: Whether to restart the video automatically after reaching the end.

muted.description: Whether the video is muted upon loading. The true value is required for the autoplay behavior in some browsers.

pip.description: Whether to include the picture-in-picture button among the player controls and enable the picture-in-picture API.

playsinline.description: Whether the video plays inline on supported mobile devices. To force the device to play the video in fullscreen mode instead, set this value to false.

quality.description: For videos on a Vimeo Plus account or higher: the playback quality of the video. Use auto for the best possible quality given available bandwidth and other factors. You can also specify 360p, 540p, 720p, 1080p, 2k, and 4k.

responsive.description: Whether to return a responsive embed code, or one that provides intelligent adjustments based on viewing conditions. We recommend this option for mobile-optimized sites.

showByline.description: Whether to display the video owner's name.

showControls.description: Whether to display the player's interactive elements, including the play bar and sharing buttons. Set this option to false for a chromeless experience. To control playback when the play/pause button is hidden, set autoplay to true, use keyboard controls (which remain active), or implement our player SDK.

showPortrait.description: Whether to display the video owner's portrait. Only works if either title or byline are also enabled

showPreview.description: Not a Vimeo attribute: Whether the preview image should be loaded from Vimeo API. Ideally don't use it, because it will show up with some delay and will make your project feel slower.

showTitle.description: Whether the player displays the title overlay.

speed.description: Whether the player displays speed controls in the preferences menu and enables the playback rate API.

texttrack.description:
The text track to display with the video. Specify the text track by its language code (en), the language code and locale (en-US), or the language code and kind (en.captions). For this argument to work, the video must already have a text track of the given type; see our Help Center or Working with Text Track Uploads for more information.
To enable automatically generated closed captions instead, provide the value en-x-autogen. Please note that, at the present time, automatic captions are always in English.

transparent.description: Whether the responsive player and transparent background are enabled.

url.description: The ID or the URL of the video on Vimeo. You must supply one of these values to identify the video. When the video's privacy setting is Private, you must use the URL, and the URL must include the h parameter. For more information, see Vimeo’s introductory guide.

template.name: Vimeo
template.title: Vimeo
template.description: Add a video to your page that is hosted on Vimeo. Paste a Vimeo URL and configure the video in the Settings tab.

items.title: Preview Image

meta.description: Add an image asset to the page. Webstudio automatically converts images to WebP or AVIF format and makes them responsive for best performance.

optimize.description: Optimize the image for enhanced performance.

meta.label: Spinner
meta.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="100%" height="100%" style="display: block;"><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12.667 2H3.333C2.597 2 2 2.597 2 3.333v9.334C2 13.403 2.597 14 3.333 14h9.334c.736 0 1.333-.597 1.333-1.333V3.333C14 2.597 13.403 2 12.667 2Z"/></svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="100%" height="100%" style="display: block;"><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12.163 9.02v-4L8.83 1.686h-5.5A1.333 1.333 0 0 0 1.997 3.02v6"/><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M8.164 2.186v1.667a1.333 1.333 0 0 0 1.333 1.333h2.667M1.997 11.314l3 3M4.997 11.314l-3 3M6.997 14.314v-3l1.5 1.523 1.5-1.523v3M12.163 11.314v3h1.84"/></svg>

rel.description: Relationship between the location in the document containing the hyperlink and the destination resource

items.name: xml-time
items.title: Xml time
items.description: Converts machine-readable date and time to ISO format.

meta.description: Converts machine-readable date and time to ISO format.
meta.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="100%" height="100%" style="display: block;"><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M7.333 9.333H8V12M10.667 1.333V4M2 6.667h12M5.333 1.333V4"/><path stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12.667 2.667H3.333C2.597 2.667 2 3.264 2 4v9.333c0 .737.597 1.334 1.333 1.334h9.334c.736 0 1.333-.597 1.333-1.334V4c0-.736-.597-1.333-1.333-1.333Z"/></svg>

allowFullscreen.description:
Whether to allow fullscreen mode.
Original parameter: `fs`

autoplay.description:
Whether the video should autoplay.
Some browsers require the `muted` parameter to be set to `true` for autoplay to work.

captionLanguage.description:
Specifies the default language that the player will use to display captions.
The value is an ISO 639-1 two-letter language code.
Original parameter: `cc_lang_pref`

color.description:
Specifies the color that will be used in the player's video progress bar to highlight the amount of the video that the viewer has already seen.
Valid values are 'red' and 'white'.

disableKeyboard.description:
Whether to disable keyboard controls.
Original parameter: `disablekb`

endTime.description:
End time of the video in seconds.
Original parameter: `end`

inline.description: Whether to play inline on mobile (not fullscreen).

language.description:
Sets the player's interface language. The value is an ISO 639-1 two-letter language code or a fully specified locale.
Original parameter: `hl`

listId.description:
ID of the playlist to load.
Original parameter: `list`

loop.description: Whether the video should loop continuously.

muted.description:
Whether the video should start muted.
Useful for enabling autoplay in browsers that require videos to be muted.
Original parameter: `mute`

playlist.description: This parameter specifies a comma-separated list of video IDs to play

privacyEnhancedMode.description:
The Privacy Enhanced Mode of the YouTube embedded player prevents the use of views of embedded YouTube content from influencing the viewer’s browsing experience on YouTube.
https://support.google.com/youtube/answer/171780?hl=en#zippy=%2Cturn-on-privacy-enhanced-mode

referrer.description:
Referrer URL for tracking purposes.
Original parameter: `widget_referrer`

showAnnotations.description:
Whether to show annotations on the video.
Original parameter: `iv_load_policy`

showCaptions.description:
Whether captions should be shown by default.
Original parameter: `cc_load_policy`

showRelatedVideos.description:
Whether to show related videos at the end.
Original parameter: `rel`

startTime.description:
Start time of the video in seconds.
Original parameter: `start`

url.description: The YouTube video URL or ID

template.name: YouTube
template.title: YouTube
template.description: Add a video to your page that is hosted on YouTube. Paste a YouTube URL and configure the video in the Settings tab.
